reviews.review_description:
I use virtual reality headsets in care homes and I can 100% guarantee that this beautiful app will be a firm favourite.
The graphics are beautiful and the concept is brilliant, puzzles that enhance hand-eye coordination and create a sense of calm.

This VR game, set in 19th century Germany, offers a unique and immersive experience, transporting players to a rich historical era. The puzzle-solving mechanics, featuring 19th century German people and furniture, provide an enjoyable challenge. The controls are easy to grasp, and I like the fact that it works without controllers, just with hand tracking. It also works offline. Overall, it's a great VR experience that history enthusiasts and puzzle lovers will appreciate.
Edit: There are now new levels with fish and butterfly puzzles that I am looking forward to trying out.
Very simple game with a unique look. Puzzling through the 19th century fashion and design is fun and meditative.

First of all I appreciate how the instructions for use are in quick visuals ( I learned how to use my hand tracking quickly by controller placement). The articulation you can perform with the puzzle pieces while hand tracking is beautifully executed. I appreciate the fact that you can take a puzzle piece and bring it up close to glance at the 1800's art (gives me classic carnival faire feels). All levels promise to have a look and feel for their theme. Overall a very immersive experience for a classically relaxing pastime.
